title: OCI After-Hours IAM Activity (Time-Based Anomaly)
description: Detects IAM configuration changes made outside normal business hours (before 06:00 or after 22:00 UTC). Identity changes at unusual hours may indicate a compromised account being used when legitimate users are not monitoring. Uses time-based anomaly detection (Threat Hunter's Cookbook: Forecasting/Anomaly Detection - temporal patterns).
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and 'Event Type' like 'com.oraclecloud.identitycontrolplane.*' | eval hour = toNumber(formatDate(Time, 'HH')) | where hour < 6 or hour > 22 | stats count as after_hours_changes by 'User Name', 'Event Type' | sort -after_hours_changes
falsepositives: Scheduled automation running outside business hours
